signatureMove.name: Play Dead
signatureMove.endStepEffect: Enemy characters cannot target this model with actions until this model next performs an action or the end of the turn, whichever comes first.

abilities.name: The Bright Side of Death
abilities.description: Immediately after models have been deployed but before turn 1 begins, friendly characters with Reanimate gain [Reanimate Jobie (0)]: Place a friendly slain Jobie in base contact with this model. Restore all its health. It gains +2 energy. It may activate this turn. A friendly troupe may only enter play via Reanimate Jobie once per turn, until end of game.

abilities.name: A Cunning Plan
abilities.description: This character places one Moonstone it is in possession of, within 2" of itself at depth value of 1. Then it is immediately slain.

abilities.name: That's Mine, This is Mine...
abilities.description: This model gains possession of one Moonstone it is in base contact with, with a depth value of 0, unless it has no cards or enemy engagements.

arcaneOutcomes.text: Target suffers X Impact Dmg. Regardless of its depth value or enemy engagements.
If the target is slain, the target loses possession of one Moonstone they are carrying. Place it in base contact with the target at depth value of 1.
